pillars.title: Security
pillars.description: Public access is explicitly configured via bucket policy. Website hosting uses S3 native static hosting — no server-side code execution surface.

pillars.title: Reliability
pillars.description: S3 provides 99.99% availability and 11 nines of durability. Static files are automatically replicated across multiple AZs within the region.

pillars.title: Cost Optimization
pillars.description: S3 static website hosting is one of the cheapest ways to serve web content. No compute costs — pay only for storage and data transfer.

pillars.title: Performance Efficiency
pillars.description: S3 serves static content directly with low latency. For global distribution, add CloudFront as a separate template.

pillars.title: Operational Excellence
pillars.description: Fully managed by AWS — no servers to patch or maintain. Infrastructure as Code via Pulumi ensures repeatable deployments.

features: S3 static website hosting with automatic index document
Public read access via bucket policy
Sample landing page with HTML, CSS, and logo
Website URL output for immediate access
Configurable bucket name and project name
description: Deploy a static website on S3 with public hosting enabled. Includes a sample landing page (HTML, CSS, logo) and outputs the website URL. No CloudFront or custom domain — just fast, cheap static hosting.
